text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Youth Business Programs 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF JUNIOR ACHIEVEMENT OF OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON JUNIOR ACHIEVEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides age-appropriate programs to reinforce the values of workforce readiness, entrepreneurship, and financial literacy. Students are introduced to economic concepts, facts about the working world, and how education is relevant to the workplace. 7830 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-3pm Email (503) 238-6430 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JUNIOR ACHIEVEMENT OF OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON JUNIOR ACHIEVEMENT
